eng11.label: ENG-11 Orphaned Sidebar IDs
eng11.detail: All sidebars use autogenerated — no explicit IDs to orphan

frontmatter.title: Artificial Intelligence: Overview and Types
frontmatter.rationale: AI improves nanoscale design and process optimization.
frontmatter.note: Training and inference at scale require substantial compute and power growth.

frontmatter.title: Holography and Volumetric Display Technology
frontmatter.comparison: Princess Leia's hologram message is becoming reality with volumetric displays and holographic projections
frontmatter.dystopianAngle: In a world where holographic avatars replace human presence
frontmatter.metaDescription: Explore holography technology, volumetric visualization, and 3D projection systems that create life-sized 3D environments.
frontmatter.rationale: Holographic projection extends social and enterprise metaverse experiences.
frontmatter.note: Brightness, compute, and real-time rendering overhead can bottleneck adoption.

docs.title: Virtual Reality and Immersive Technology Overview

frontmatter.title: Virtual Reality and Immersive Technology Overview
frontmatter.comparison: Modern VR is approaching the OASIS vision - immersive worlds where physical and digital blur
frontmatter.dystopianAngle: In a world where people prefer virtual existence over physical reality
frontmatter.metaDescription: Explore virtual reality and immersive technologies that create simulated environments and blur the line between digital and physical worlds.
frontmatter.rationale: Both trajectories focus on spatial immersion and embodied interaction.
frontmatter.note: Behavioral telemetry and context modeling shape immersive adaptation loops.

frontmatter.title: 5G Networks Expand
frontmatter.description: Broad 5G deployment expands high-throughput, low-latency mobile connectivity and supports real-time distributed compute applications.

frontmatter.title: AlphaFold 2 Protein Structures (200M+ Predictions Released)
frontmatter.description: Release of 200M+ AlphaFold-predicted protein structures marks a major expansion of AI-supported structural biology resources.

docs.title: Autonomous Vehicles Expand (Waymo, Tesla FSD, Cruise)

frontmatter.title: Autonomous Vehicles Expand (Waymo, Tesla FSD, Cruise)
frontmatter.description: Expansion of autonomous driving deployments across leading programs signals growing operational maturity in constrained urban and highway domains.
establishes: Supervised/unsupervised autonomous driving in limited domains

frontmatter.title: ChatGPT Released (November)
frontmatter.description: ChatGPT's release brings conversational large language models to mainstream users, rapidly reshaping expectations for natural language interfaces.

frontmatter.title: Claude Sonnet 4 (Anthropic)
frontmatter.description: Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4 milestone highlights expanded context handling and stronger reasoning performance for enterprise and developer workflows.

frontmatter.title: COVID-19 mRNA Vaccines (Pfizer/BioNTech, Moderna)
frontmatter.description: Emergency authorization of COVID-19 mRNA vaccines validates rapid programmable vaccine design and large-scale deployment under crisis timelines.

frontmatter.title: DALL-E (Text-to-Image AI)
frontmatter.description: DALL-E demonstrates practical text-to-image synthesis, translating natural language prompts into coherent visual outputs.

frontmatter.title: GitHub Copilot
frontmatter.description: GitHub Copilot introduces AI pair programming into mainstream software workflows, embedding generative assistance directly in code editors.

frontmatter.title: GPT-3 Released (175B Parameters)
frontmatter.description: GPT-3 scales autoregressive language modeling to 175B parameters, demonstrating strong few-shot behavior and broad API-first deployment potential.

frontmatter.title: GPT-4 Released
frontmatter.description: GPT-4 introduces stronger reasoning and multimodal capability, expanding reliable AI use across complex professional and consumer workflows.

frontmatter.title: James Webb Space Telescope Launch
frontmatter.description: Launch of the James Webb Space Telescope expands deep infrared observational capacity and extends visibility into the early universe.

frontmatter.title: Sora (OpenAI Video Generation)
frontmatter.description: Sora demonstrates high-fidelity text-to-video generation, extending generative AI from static imagery into coherent dynamic scene synthesis.

frontmatter.title: Stable Diffusion (Open-Source Text-to-Image)
frontmatter.description: Stable Diffusion brings open-source text-to-image generation to broad users and developers, accelerating creative AI experimentation and deployment.

frontmatter.title: Volvo Crash-Proof Car Concepts (Radar/Sonar/Camera Fusion)
frontmatter.description: Volvo's crash-proof concept direction emphasizes multi-sensor fusion for proactive vehicle safety and near-zero-collision operation.

frontmatter.title: XPRIZE Avatar (Robot Avatar Competition Launched)
frontmatter.description: The XPRIZE Avatar competition launches to accelerate systems that enable humans to project skilled physical presence through robotic embodiments.

frontmatter.title: AGI Precursors/Narrow AGI Claims Emerge
frontmatter.description: Claims of AGI precursors and narrow AGI emerge as models achieve broad cross-domain competence on many benchmarked cognitive tasks.
establishes: Human-level performance on many cognitive tasks

docs.title: AR Glasses Mainstream (Apple Vision Successor, Meta)

frontmatter.title: AR Glasses Mainstream (Apple Vision Successor, Meta)
frontmatter.description: Mainstream AR glasses adoption brings lightweight all-day spatial interfaces into routine work, communication, and navigation contexts.

frontmatter.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces (Commercial, Neuralink-Type)
frontmatter.description: Commercial brain-computer interfaces move beyond clinical pilots into consumer-facing interaction products with direct neural input pathways.

frontmatter.title: Gene Therapy Becomes Routine
frontmatter.description: Gene therapy transitions from specialized intervention to routine clinical practice across a widening set of inherited disorders.

frontmatter.title: Lab-Grown Organs for Transplantation
frontmatter.description: Engineered organ generation from patient-derived cells reaches clinical transplant readiness, reducing dependence on donor scarcity.
establishes: Custom organ generation from patient cells

frontmatter.title: Neuromorphic Chips in Data Centers
frontmatter.description: Neuromorphic processors enter data-center deployments, introducing event-driven architectures that improve AI efficiency for selective inference workloads.

frontmatter.title: Solid-State Batteries Commercialize
frontmatter.description: Commercial solid-state batteries deliver improved energy density, charging performance, and safety characteristics compared with mainstream lithium-ion systems.

frontmatter.title: 1TB SD Cards Available
frontmatter.description: Availability of terabyte-class SD storage marks a major jump in portable media capacity for mobile and edge capture workflows.

frontmatter.title: AlphaGo Defeats Go Professional
frontmatter.description: AlphaGo's victory over a professional Go player demonstrates major progress in deep reinforcement learning and strategic AI decision-making.

docs.title: AlphaGo Defeats Lee Sedol (Go World Champion)

frontmatter.title: AlphaGo Defeats Lee Sedol (Go World Champion)
frontmatter.description: AlphaGo's match victory over Lee Sedol demonstrates superhuman strategic performance in a complex intuition-heavy domain.

frontmatter.title: Brain-Machine Interfaces for Paralysis (BrainGate Trials)
frontmatter.description: BrainGate clinical trials advance brain-machine interfaces that translate neural signals into direct control of external assistive devices.
establishes: Direct neural control of external devices

docs.title: CRISPR-Cas9 Gene Editing in Human Embryos (China)

frontmatter.title: CRISPR-Cas9 Gene Editing in Human Embryos (China)
frontmatter.description: Early reported CRISPR-Cas9 editing in non-viable human embryos marks a major inflection point in applied genome engineering and bioethics discourse.

frontmatter.title: Curiosity Rover (Mars Science Laboratory)
frontmatter.description: Curiosity lands on Mars as a car-sized mobile laboratory, demonstrating precision sky crane delivery and long-duration surface science operations.

frontmatter.title: Deep Learning Breakthrough (ImageNet, AlexNet)
frontmatter.description: ImageNet results from AlexNet demonstrate that deep convolutional neural networks trained with GPU acceleration can dramatically improve vision performance.

docs.title: Event Horizon Telescope Images Black Hole (M87*)

frontmatter.title: Event Horizon Telescope Images Black Hole (M87*)
frontmatter.description: The Event Horizon Telescope collaboration releases the first image of a black hole shadow, marking a landmark in observational astrophysics.

frontmatter.title: Gaia Telescope Launches
frontmatter.description: ESA's Gaia mission launches to build a high-precision three-dimensional map of over a billion stars in the Milky Way.

frontmatter.title: Google Quantum Supremacy Claim (Sycamore)
frontmatter.description: Google's Sycamore result claims quantum supremacy on a specialized benchmark, intensifying debate around practical quantum advantage and measurement criteria.

frontmatter.title: GPT-1 Released (OpenAI)
frontmatter.description: OpenAI's GPT-1 demonstrates generative pre-training followed by task adaptation, helping define the modern foundation model trajectory.

frontmatter.title: GPT-2 Released
frontmatter.description: GPT-2 demonstrates substantially improved long-form language generation, highlighting both capability gains and misuse concerns.

frontmatter.title: IBM Watson Wins Jeopardy
frontmatter.description: IBM Watson's Jeopardy victory demonstrates practical large-scale question-answering and natural language understanding in a high-visibility setting.

frontmatter.title: iPad Released
frontmatter.description: Release of the iPad establishes the modern consumer tablet category and expands touch-first personal computing.

frontmatter.title: ITER Fusion Project Construction Advances
frontmatter.description: Major construction progress at ITER marks a critical systems-integration phase toward demonstrating sustained fusion power generation.

docs.title: Light Peak/Thunderbolt 3 (100 Gbps Capable Protocols Demonstrated)

frontmatter.title: Light Peak/Thunderbolt 3 (100 Gbps Capable Protocols Demonstrated)
frontmatter.description: Advances in Light Peak/Thunderbolt-class interconnects and protocol demonstrations push ultra-high-speed data transfer for demanding peripheral and compute workflows.

frontmatter.title: Personal 3D Printing (Consumer Models Under $1000)
frontmatter.description: Consumer 3D printers below $1000 expand access to desktop fabrication for homes, classrooms, and small teams.

frontmatter.title: Portable Wound-Sealing Laser Pen (Concept/Development)
frontmatter.description: Concept and development of a portable wound-sealing laser pen for point-of-care tissue closure in constrained settings.

frontmatter.title: Raspberry Pi Released
frontmatter.description: Release of Raspberry Pi introduces an inexpensive capable computer that accelerates maker culture and practical computing education.

frontmatter.title: Siri (Voice Assistant)
frontmatter.description: Introduction of Siri as a built-in mobile voice assistant establishes conversational AI as a mainstream interface layer.

frontmatter.title: Solar Impulse 2 (Around-World Solar Flight)
frontmatter.description: Solar Impulse 2 demonstrates long-duration solar-electric aviation through a multi-stage around-the-world mission.

docs.title: Transformer Architecture Paper (Attention Is All You Need)

frontmatter.title: Transformer Architecture Paper (Attention Is All You Need)
frontmatter.description: The Transformer paper introduces a self-attention-first architecture that reshapes sequence modeling and accelerates modern AI progress.

docs.title: VR Headsets (Oculus Rift, HTC Vive Consumer Release)

frontmatter.title: VR Headsets (Oculus Rift, HTC Vive Consumer Release)
frontmatter.description: Consumer release of Oculus Rift and HTC Vive establishes modern immersive VR as a viable mainstream platform category.

frontmatter.title: 4G LTE Networks Deploy
frontmatter.description: Commercial deployment of 4G LTE networks establishes high-throughput, lower-latency mobile broadband for rich real-time applications.

frontmatter.title: Airbnb Founded (Sharing Economy)
frontmatter.description: Founding of Airbnb demonstrates platform-mediated peer services and trust mechanisms that scale the sharing economy.

frontmatter.title: Android OS (HTC Dream)
frontmatter.description: Commercial debut of Android with the HTC Dream establishes an open mobile operating system model integrated with cloud-native services.

frontmatter.title: AWS Infrastructure Services Begin
frontmatter.description: Amazon begins externalizing infrastructure capabilities, culminating in foundational AWS services such as SQS, S3, and EC2.

frontmatter.title: Bitcoin Whitepaper (Nakamoto)
frontmatter.description: Publication of the Bitcoin whitepaper proposes a decentralized digital currency secured by proof-of-work and a chained transaction ledger.

frontmatter.title: Facebook Launched
frontmatter.description: Launch of Facebook, advancing real-identity social networking and algorithmic feed-based engagement at global scale.

frontmatter.title: Hadoop Released (Open-Source)
frontmatter.description: Open-source release of Hadoop establishes a practical framework for distributed storage and large-scale data processing.

frontmatter.title: Human Genome Project Completed
frontmatter.description: Completion of the Human Genome Project delivers a reference map of human DNA and industrial-scale sequencing workflows.

frontmatter.title: iPhone Released
frontmatter.description: Release of the iPhone establishes a multi-touch, software-centric smartphone model and accelerates the shift to mobile-first internet computing.

frontmatter.title: iPod Released
frontmatter.description: Release of the iPod, combining high-capacity portable music with a tightly integrated digital ecosystem.

frontmatter.title: Second Life (Virtual Worlds)
frontmatter.description: Launch of Second Life as a persistent, user-built virtual world with a native digital economy.

frontmatter.title: Twitter Launched
frontmatter.description: Launch of Twitter, establishing microblogging and rapid real-time information exchange in public social networks.

frontmatter.title: Wikipedia Launched
frontmatter.description: Launch of Wikipedia, establishing large-scale collaborative knowledge creation on the web.

frontmatter.title: YouTube Launched
frontmatter.description: Launch of YouTube as a user-generated video platform that accelerates viral distribution and global creator participation.

docs.title: The Metaverse: Synthesis of Reality Implementations

frontmatter.title: The Metaverse: Synthesis of Reality Implementations
frontmatter.comparison: Neal Stephenson's Metaverse vision is materializing through persistent virtual worlds and spatial computing platforms
frontmatter.dystopianAngle: In a world where virtual existence is preferred over physical reality
frontmatter.metaDescription: Explore how the Metaverse synthesizes MR, AR, VR, and XR technologies into persistent virtual worlds and spatial computing platforms.
frontmatter.rationale: Spatial telepresence and volumetric media increase social presence.
frontmatter.note: Long-range societal predictions diverge rapidly as immersive adoption crosses cultural thresholds.

frontmatter.title: Nanotechnology: Miniaturization and Molecular Manufacturing
frontmatter.comparison: Michael Crichton's nanobot swarms from Prey parallel current development of self-replicating nanoscale robotics
frontmatter.dystopianAngle: In a world where self-replicating nanobots escape human control
frontmatter.metaDescription: Explore nanotechnology's role in miniaturization, molecular manufacturing, and creating autonomous nanoscale objects and systems.
frontmatter.rationale: Advanced nanomaterials can improve wearable and spatial interfaces.
frontmatter.note: AI-assisted search shortens iteration cycles in material and process design.

frontmatter.title: AGI Emergence (Human-Level General Intelligence)
frontmatter.description: Emergence of human-level general intelligence with systems matching broad cognitive capability across domains.
establishes: Systems matching human cognitive breadth and depth

frontmatter.title: Fusion Commercialization Forecast Sample
frontmatter.description: Abundant energy expands compute budgets for frontier AI systems.
frontmatter.reason: Stronger materials and confinement signals improved the outlook
frontmatter.author: copilot
frontmatter.explanation: Expert priors remain cautious because commercialization still depends on multiple bottlenecks.
frontmatter.name: Superconducting Magnet Cost Curve
frontmatter.rationale: Better quantum tools can accelerate materials and simulation workflows.
frontmatter.note: Each engineering improvement shortens the next iteration cycle.

frontmatter.title: Molecular Assemblers (Early Nanotechnology Manufacturing)
frontmatter.description: Early molecular assembler commercialization phase introduces nanotechnology manufacturing with atomic-scale process control.

frontmatter.title: Nuclear Fusion Power Plants (Commercial Operation)
frontmatter.description: Commercial fusion power plants begin operation with net-positive output and grid-connected deployment.

frontmatter.title: Personal AI Agents (Autonomous Digital Assistants)
frontmatter.description: Personal autonomous AI agents become proactive, context-aware representatives operating across user systems and workflows.

frontmatter.title: Quantum Computing Commercialization (Error-Corrected Systems)
frontmatter.description: Commercialization phase for error-corrected quantum systems, transitioning from noisy prototypes to early fault-tolerant utility.

frontmatter.title: Quantum Internet Nodes (First Intercity Links)
frontmatter.description: First intercity quantum internet nodes establish early quantum-network infrastructure and secure entanglement-enabled communication.

frontmatter.title: Space-Based Solar Power Demonstration
frontmatter.description: Demonstration phase for orbital solar collection and power beaming to Earth-scale receivers.

frontmatter.title: Synthetic Biology Organisms (Designed Life)
frontmatter.description: Designed biological systems transition to engineered organisms created for targeted functional outcomes.

frontmatter.title: Artificial Wombs (Ectogenesis)
frontmatter.description: Artificial womb systems enable full external gestation, expanding reproductive options and reducing pregnancy-related risk.
establishes: External gestation from conception to birth

frontmatter.title: Cybernetic Organisms Widespread (Bio-Digital Integration)
frontmatter.description: Cybernetic organisms become widespread through mature bio-digital integration across medicine, labor, and daily life.

frontmatter.title: Extended Lifespan (150+ Years Achievable)
frontmatter.description: Major longevity breakthroughs make lifespans of 150+ years achievable for growing portions of the population.

frontmatter.title: Global Brain-to-Brain Communication Network (Early Trials)
frontmatter.description: Early global trials connect participants through direct neural interfaces, enabling experimental brain-to-brain communication at scale.

frontmatter.title: Memory Augmentation Implants (Commercial)
frontmatter.description: Commercial memory augmentation implants enable direct interfaces for encoding and recall in everyday cognitive workflows.

frontmatter.title: Molecular Medicine (Nanobots in Bloodstream)
frontmatter.description: Programmable nanobots in the bloodstream enable precision intervention, real-time diagnostics, and continuous cellular-level treatment.

frontmatter.title: Neuromorphic Computing Dominates AI Infrastructure
frontmatter.description: Neuromorphic systems become dominant AI infrastructure, shifting compute from conventional accelerators to brain-like architectures.

frontmatter.title: Semantic Web (Web 3.0 Maturity - Meaning-Aware Internet)
frontmatter.description: Web 3.0 reaches semantic maturity with machine-interpretable meaning, enabling reasoning-native internet infrastructure.

frontmatter.title: Space Elevator Construction Begins
frontmatter.description: Construction begins on early space elevator infrastructure, aiming to transform access between Earth's surface and orbit.

frontmatter.title: Superintelligent AI (Significantly Beyond Human Intelligence)
frontmatter.description: AI systems cross into superintelligence with capabilities that significantly exceed human general cognition.
